result:
Data cleaning complete. The cleaned dataset has been saved to data/output/cleaned_data.csv with 16,111 observations and 9 variables:

- NSID: Cohort member identifier
- ecoact17: Harmonized economic activity at age 17 (6 categories)
- ecoact18: Harmonized economic activity at age 18 (6 categories)
- ecoact19: Harmonized economic activity at age 19 (6 categories)
- ecoact20: Harmonized economic activity at age 20 (6 categories)
- ecoact25: Harmonized economic activity at age 25 (6 categories)
- ecoact32: Harmonized economic activity at age 32 (6 categories)
- ecoactadu25: Detailed economic activity at age 25 (10 categories)
- ecoactadu32: Detailed economic activity at age 32 (10 categories)

The script successfully:
1. Loaded all 7 tab-delimited files from data/input/
2. Merged datasets using full_join by NSID
3. Converted wave-specific missing value codes to standard codes (-9=Refusal, -8=Don't know, -1=Not applicable, -3=Not asked, -2=Schedule not applicable)
4. Created harmonized 6-category economic activity variables for all ages (17, 18, 19, 20, 25, 32)
5. Created detailed 10-category adult variables for ages 25 and 32
6. Applied wave-specific recoding logic for each variable
7. Converted all variables to factors with appropriate labels
8. Output the final cleaned dataset to data/output/cleaned_data.csv
